// n = 20, k = 10, seed = 9527, # of sigma = 20, # of algorithms = 3

Hybrid Algorithm
3	3	5	5	5	7	7	9	11	13	14	14	15	18	18	19	16	16	15	15
3	3	5	5	5	7	7	7	9	11	13	14	14	14	16	15	14	14	14	14
3	3	5	5	5	5	7	7	9	9	11	13	14	15	15	16	16	19	16	15
3	3	5	5	5	7	7	7	9	11	13	14	14	16	16	14	15	16	17	15
3	3	5	5	5	5	7	7	9	11	13	14	14	16	19	15	15	16	15	17
3	3	5	5	5	5	7	7	9	11	13	14	14	15	15	19	16	18	14	14
